\tzpentry{ID3484}{Density Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3484 introduces Density Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \rho\!\left(\frac{\partial\mathbf{u}}{\partial t} + (\mathbf{u}\!\cdot\!\nabla)\mathbf{u}\right) = -\nabla p + \mu \nabla^2\mathbf{u} + \mathbf{f}_\text{mag} + \mathbf{f}_\text{ext}, \]
